differentials.name: Cirrhosis → compensatory response to decreased portal venous flow
differentials.raw: Cirrhosis → compensatory response to decreased portal venous flow

differentials.name: Intrahepatic arteriovenous shunting (a)  vascular neoplasm (b)  hepatic artery-portal vein fistula
differentials.raw: Intrahepatic arteriovenous shunting (a)  vascular neoplasm (b)  hepatic artery-portal vein fistula

context: A high RI is not specific for liver disease; therefore, it is less meaningful as an isolated finding than is a low RI. Cause:   biopsy, trauma √  turbulent high-velocity low-resistance flow √  soft-tissue bruit (= random assignment of color in perivascular soft tissue due to tissue vibration) √  arterialized frequently retrograde flow in portal vein √  large tortuous feeding arteries with high velocity + aliased flow √  multiple dilated vessels (representing AVMs) √  large draining veins √  areas of fatty change + fibrosis
